rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss The Complaint Or In The Alternative, For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, APPEAL DIVESTS COURT OF JURISDICTION. WHILE AN APPEAL OF AN ORDER VACATING DEFAULT IS NOT APPEALABLE WHERE NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED, see Veliscescu v. Pauna, (1991) 231 Cal.App.3d 1521, A DIRECT APPEAL MAY BE TAKEN FROM AN ORDER VACATING DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. See Elsea v. Saberi, (1992) 4 Cal.App.4th 625. (PB)
